signed_statement: I authorize SMV1 source/rule authority choices A, B, and C: AUTHORIZE_PANEL_ALLOCATION_SOURCE_REVIEW, AUTHORIZE_COMPONENT_GEOMETRY_AUTHORITY, and AUTHORIZE_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_RULE_AUTHORITY. I do not select D: REJECT_ALL_AUTHORITY_LANES. This authorization is limited to SHEETMETAL_FIRST_MODULAR_PANEL_MODEL_V1, calibration project 1110101, subsequently qualified SHEETMETAL_ALLOWED_EVAL projects, development, testing, evaluation, private-preview readiness, and outputs clearly marked NOT FOR FABRICATION / PRIVATE PREVIEW. All non-negotiable constraints remain in force.

selected_authority_lanes.label: AUTHORIZE_PANEL_ALLOCATION_SOURCE_REVIEW
selected_authority_lanes.scope: bounded local review and possible approval of panel-allocation evidence only when chronology, role, identity, revision, non-derivation, privacy, provenance, confidence, and unresolved-status requirements are met

selected_authority_lanes.label: AUTHORIZE_COMPONENT_GEOMETRY_AUTHORITY
selected_authority_lanes.scope: versioned component-geometry library using official or approved documentation, explicit allowed-source geometry, or approved conservative generic envelopes; public lookup may use only minimal manufacturer/model identifiers and no private project context

selected_authority_lanes.label: AUTHORIZE_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_RULE_AUTHORITY
selected_authority_lanes.scope: versioned private-preview engineering-rule library for topology, sizing, clearance, and placement constraints with evidence, applicability, exclusions, synthetic regression coverage, fail-closed behavior, and independent audit

applies_to: outputs clearly marked NOT FOR FABRICATION / PRIVATE PREVIEW
does_not_permit: removal of mandatory human CAD review
automatic approval of every proposed source, geometry entry, or rule
